pkgmetadata.longdescription:
It turns out that this combinator
> f ~@~ g = (f .) . (. g)
is a powerful thing. It was abstracted from following (commonly used) pattern @f . h . g@ where @f@ and @g@ are fixed.
This library not only defines @~\@~@ combinator, but also a some derived combinators that can help us to easily define a lot of things including lenses. See <http://hackage.haskell.org/package/lens lens package> for detais on what lenses are.
README and ChangeLog can be found in source code package and on GitHub:
* <https://github.com/trskop/between/blob/master/README.md>
* <https://github.com/trskop/between/blob/master/ChangeLog.md>
